items.title: Tracking Philippe Laffont's ~$41B Coatue Management Portfolio - Q3 2025 Update
items.description: Coatue Management's Q3 2025 13F portfolio rose to $40.79B, with 75 positions. Check out the stake increases, decreases, and new positions in the portfolio here.

items.title: Amazon, Target, Walmart and big retail's holiday return policies
items.description: Nearly everyone has had the experience of opening a gift from some well-intending friend or relative and having to fake a smile. items.title: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin Taps SpaceX Rival United Launch Alliance's Former CEO To Lead Its New National Security-Focused Unit
items.description: Blue Origin, the aerospace company established by Amazon founder Jeff Bezos, has announced the appointment of Tory Bruno as the president of its national security division.
